calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Feb-28-2005 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Feb-28-2005 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on as re-assigned by the Master Calendar Dept. 206 for Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Tony Vaughn.
Michael Miller, Esq. for Plaintiff: Allwood Door Company.
No appearance by the Defendants: Gregory S. Sramek and Sterling Builders, Inc.
Plaintiff's witness: James Mrad, was sworn and direct examined.
After hearing the evidence presented and declaration of Robert Howell, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendants: Gregory S. Sramek and Sterling Builders, Inc.as follows:
Principal $15,275.05
Prejudgment Interest $2,974.35
Attorney's Fees $1,875.00
Costs $411.50 for a total of $20,535.90
Judgment signed in open court.
